tools.name: Claude
tools.shortDesc: Anthropic's flagship AI — Claude Sonnet 4.6 leads in coding, analysis, and long-context tasks.
tools.fullDesc: Claude is a large language model developed by Anthropic with a focus on safety and usefulness. Claude 3.5 Sonnet is one of the most capable LLMs available, excelling at writing code, analyzing complex data, and generating creative content.

info.label: Models
info.value: <cite index="4-8">Claude Opus 4.7 (flagship reasoning), Claude Sonnet 4.6 (balanced mid-tier), and Claude Haiku 4.5 (fast and cost-efficient)</cite>

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="2-2">Up to 1 million tokens</cite>

info.label: Released
info.value: <cite index="6-1,6-22">Opus 4.7 released April 16, 2026</cite>

info.label: Pricing
info.value: <cite index="9-1">Claude Haiku 4.5: $1.00 input / $5.00 output per million tokens, Claude Sonnet 4.6: $3.00 / $15.00, Claude Opus 4.7: $5.00 / $25.00</cite>

features: Process documents up to 200K tokens in a single request
Write and debug high-quality code in any language
Analyze PDFs, spreadsheets, and complex documents
Strong reasoning and multi-step problem solving
Computer use: automate real desktop interactions
Projects: persistent context and custom instructions

demo.title: Go to Claude
demo.desc: Visit claude.ai and create a free account with your email.

demo.title: Start a conversation
demo.desc: Type your question or request into the chat. Claude understands natural, detailed instructions.

demo.title: Upload files
demo.desc: Attach PDFs, images, or code files and ask Claude to analyze them.

demo.title: Use Projects
demo.desc: Create a Project to save context and give Claude persistent custom instructions.

prompts.label: Analyze text
prompts.text:
Analyze the following passage and summarize: (1) the main argument, (2) key supporting points, (3) logical strengths and weaknesses:
[paste text here]

prompts.label: Write code
prompts.text: Write a Python function to [describe functionality]. Include type hints, a docstring, and unit tests.

prompts.label: Professional writing
prompts.text:
Rewrite the following in a formal, academic tone suitable for a research paper, preserving all technical terms:
[text]

vi.shortDesc: Trợ lý AI hàng đầu của Anthropic — Claude Sonnet 4.6 vượt trội về lập trình, phân tích và xử lý văn bản dài.
vi.fullDesc: Claude là mô hình AI được Anthropic phát triển với trọng tâm vào an toàn và hiệu quả. Claude Sonnet 4.6 là mô hình mặc định cho người dùng Free và Pro, nổi bật với khả năng lập trình, viết lách và phân tích tài liệu dài.

zh.shortDesc: Anthropic 的旗舰 AI — Claude Sonnet 4.6 在编程、分析和长文本处理方面表现卓越。
zh.fullDesc: Claude 是 Anthropic 开发的 AI 模型，专注于安全性和可靠性。Claude Sonnet 4.6 是 Free 和 Pro 用户的默认模型，在编程、写作和长文档分析方面表现突出。

tools.name: ChatGPT
tools.shortDesc: The world's most popular AI chatbot — now powered by GPT-5 with 400K context and computer use.
tools.fullDesc: ChatGPT by OpenAI is the most widely used AI conversation app in the world. GPT-4o unifies text, image, and voice processing in a single model for a seamless experience.

info.label: Models
info.value: <cite index="9-20,9-22,9-23">GPT-5.5 Instant is ChatGPT's new default model, replacing GPT-5.3 Instant for all users</cite>. <cite index="2-4,2-5">Plus users get access to GPT-5.5 Thinking with Standard and Extended thinking-time toggles, and GPT-5.5 Pro model access for Pro tiers and above</cite>.

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="2-5">Pro $200 offers a 1M-token context window in ChatGPT</cite>. <cite index="7-17">In Codex, GPT-5.5 is available with a 400K context window</cite>.

info.label: Released
info.value: <cite index="2-24">GPT-5.5 launched April 23, 2026 across Plus, Pro, Business, and Enterprise in both ChatGPT and Codex</cite>. <cite index="9-20,9-24">GPT-5.5 Instant rolled out as the new default model starting May 2026 to all ChatGPT users</cite>.

info.label: Pricing
info.value: <cite index="2-2">Free is $0 with ads, Go is $8 per month with ads, and Plus is $20</cite>. <cite index="2-3">Pro $100 launched April 9, 2026, and Pro $200 remains available</cite>. <cite index="2-30">Business is $20/seat annual or $25 monthly</cite>. <cite index="7-19">For API developers, gpt-5.5 is available at $5 per 1M input tokens and $30 per 1M output tokens</cite>.

features: GPT-4o: unified text, image, and voice processing
DALL-E 3 built-in: generate images from descriptions
Real-time web browsing via Bing Search
Advanced Data Analysis: run Python, analyze data
GPTs: build and share custom AI assistants
Voice Mode: have natural spoken conversations

demo.title: Sign up for ChatGPT

demo.title: Select a model
demo.desc: In the top bar, choose GPT-4o (requires Plus) or use GPT-3.5 for free.

demo.title: Use attachments
demo.desc: Click the paperclip icon to upload images or files. Use the microphone for Voice Mode.

demo.title: Create a custom GPT
demo.desc: Go to "Explore GPTs" → "Create" to build a personalized assistant for your workflow.

prompts.text: Search the web and summarize the latest news about [topic] from the last 7 days. Include sources.

tools.name: Gemini
tools.shortDesc: Google's multimodal AI — Gemini 3.1 Pro with 1M context, native video/audio, and Google Search built in.
tools.fullDesc: Gemini 1.5 Pro by Google boasts a massive 1 million token context window — enough to process an entire codebase or novel in one go. It integrates deeply with the Google ecosystem including Gmail, Drive, and Docs.

info.label: Models
info.value: Latest: Gemini 3.1 Pro (flagship). Also available: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, Gemini 3 Flash, Gemini 2.5 family (Pro, Flash, Flash-Lite). Specialized models: Nano Banana 2 (images), Veo 3.1 (video), Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS (text-to-speech), Gemini 3.1 Flash Image, Gemini Robotics-ER

info.label: Context
info.value: Gemini 3.1 Pro supports 2M token context window. Standard context up to 200K tokens, with extended context pricing above 200K

info.label: Released
info.value: Gemini 3.1 Pro: stable/production. Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: March 3, 2026 (preview)

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Gemini 3.1 Pro: $2/$12 per 1M tokens (up to 200K context), $4/$18 above 200K. Gemini 3 Flash: $0.50/$3. Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite: $0.10/$0.40. Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: $0.25/$1.50. Batch API: 50% discount. Free tier: Flash/Flash-Lite models only (Pro models paid-only as of April 1, 2026)

features: 1M token context: analyze entire large codebases
Deep Google Workspace integration: Gmail, Drive, Docs
Process long videos, audio files, and images
Gemini Advanced: access to the most powerful Ultra model
Gems: create custom AI assistants for specific tasks

vi.shortDesc: Công cụ tạo ảnh AI mạnh mẽ nhất — tạo ra hình ảnh nghệ thuật, điện ảnh chất lượng cao từ mô tả văn bản.

tools.name: Stable Diffusion
tools.shortDesc: Open-source, runs locally, infinitely customizable with thousands of community models.

info.label: Platform

LoRA: fine-tune specific characters and styles
ControlNet: control pose, depth, and edges precisely

demo.title: Install AUTOMATIC1111
demo.desc: Clone the repo and run the startup script.
demo.code:
git clone https://github.com/AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
cd stable-diffusion-webui
./webui.sh  # or webui.bat on Windows

demo.title: Download a model
demo.desc: Go to civitai.com, download a .safetensors model and place it in models/Stable-diffusion.

demo.title: Generate an image
demo.desc: Open localhost:7860, enter a prompt and negative prompt, then adjust steps and CFG scale.

demo.title: Add a LoRA
demo.desc: Download a LoRA from Civitai and place it in models/Lora. Reference it in your prompt as: <lora:filename:0.8>

prompts.label: Anime style
prompts.text:
(masterpiece, best quality), 1girl, beautiful face, anime style <lora:anime_style:0.8>
Negative: (worst quality, low quality:1.4), deformed, blurry

prompts.label: Realistic portrait
prompts.text:
RAW photo, portrait, (photorealistic:1.4), soft lighting, 85mm lens, bokeh background
Negative: cartoon, anime, illustration, painting

pricing.note: The core model is free and open-source. Costs come only from cloud compute if you choose to run it on a hosted service instead of locally.

vi.shortDesc: Mã nguồn mở, chạy local, tùy chỉnh vô hạn — nền tảng cho cộng đồng AI art.
vi.fullDesc: Stable Diffusion là mô hình tạo ảnh mã nguồn mở chạy trên máy tính của bạn. Hàng nghìn model và extension từ cộng đồng, hoàn toàn miễn phí và riêng tư.

zh.shortDesc: 开源本地运行，无限可定制 — AI艺术社区的基础模型。

tools.name: Windsurf
tools.shortDesc: Agentic IDE where AI tracks your every move and works alongside you in real-time.
tools.fullDesc: Windsurf (by Codeium) is an AI-first IDE built around "Cascade" — an agentic AI that maintains full awareness of your edits, terminal, and codebase in real-time. It can autonomously make multi-file changes while you stay in the flow.

info.label: Context

info.label: Released
info.value: <cite index="1-19">Codeium rebranded to Windsurf in 2025</cite>

info.label: Pricing

features: Cascade: agentic AI with real-time dev context awareness
Tracks your edits, terminal output, and errors live
Multi-file changes with full project understanding
Supercomplete: fills in entire logic blocks as you type
Inline diff view: review every AI change before accepting
Cheaper than Cursor for similar capabilities

pricing.note: Windsurf uses "credits" for Cascade agentic actions. Free plan is very generous for solo devs. Pro is ~25% cheaper than Cursor for comparable features.

tools.name: OpenClaw
tools.shortDesc: Your own 24/7 AI agent living on your machine — chat via WhatsApp, Telegram, or Discord.
tools.fullDesc: OpenClaw is an open-source personal AI assistant that runs on your own computer (Mac, Windows, Linux) and connects to any chat app you already use — WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, iMessage, Slack. It has persistent memory, full system access, browser control, and a growing library of community-built skills. Your data never leaves your machine.

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="3-20,3-21,3-22">OpenClaw is a personal AI assistant you run on your own devices. It answers you on the channels you already use. It can speak and listen on macOS/iOS/Android, and can render a live Canvas you control</cite>

info.label: Released

features: Runs 24/7 on your own Mac, Windows, or Linux machine
Chat via WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, iMessage, Slack, Signal
Persistent memory — remembers you across all conversations
Full system access: read/write files, run shell commands, execute scripts
Browser control: browse the web, fill forms, extract data autonomously
Skills & plugins: 50+ integrations, community ClawHub, or build your own
Proactive heartbeats: checks in with you, sends reminders, runs cron tasks
Bring your own model: Anthropic, OpenAI, or local models

tools.name: Llama (Meta AI)
tools.shortDesc: Meta's open-source LLM — Llama 4 Scout has the world's largest context window at 10M tokens.
tools.fullDesc: Llama 4 by Meta is the most capable open-source LLM family, with models from 8B to 405B+ parameters. Because weights are freely downloadable, you can run Llama on your own hardware, fine-tune it on custom data, or deploy it in private infrastructure with zero data leaving your control.

info.label: Models
info.value: Llama 4 Scout (17B active/109B total), Llama 4 Maverick (17B active/400B total)

info.label: Context

info.label: Released
info.value: April 2025

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Maverick: $0.19/M tokens (distributed), $0.30-0.49/M (single host); Scout: varies by provider

features: Completely free model weights for download
Fine-tune on your own data — no vendor lock-in
Run fully locally: Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp
Available via hosted APIs: Groq, Together AI, Perplexity
Meta AI assistant: free chatbot at meta.ai

demo.title: Try Meta AI
demo.desc: Chat at meta.ai for free — no account needed. Llama 4 Maverick powers it.

demo.title: Run locally with Ollama
demo.desc: Install Ollama and pull the model in one command.
demo.code:
curl https://ollama.ai/install.sh | sh
ollama pull llama4:scout
ollama run llama4:scout

demo.title: Use hosted API (Groq)
demo.desc: Sign up at console.groq.com for free API access — Llama runs at blazing speed on Groq hardware.
demo.code:
curl -X POST https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $GROQ_API_KEY"
  -d '{"model":"llama-4-scout","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Hello"}]}'

demo.title: Fine-tune
demo.desc: Use Unsloth or Axolotl to fine-tune Llama on your own dataset — runs on a single RTX 3090.

tools.name: Mistral AI
tools.shortDesc: European open-weight AI — DevStral leads SWE-bench for coding, beating GPT-4.1 at 1/4 the price.
tools.fullDesc: Mistral AI is a Paris-based AI lab producing some of the most efficient LLMs available. Mistral Medium 3.1 delivers performance close to GPT-4o at $0.40/1M tokens — 8x cheaper. Their open-weight models (Mistral 7B, Mixtral 8x7B) are widely used for local deployment.

prompts.label: Electronic

vi.shortDesc: Tạo nhạc AI chất lượng cực cao — cạnh tranh với Suno với âm thanh phong phú hơn.
vi.fullDesc: Udio tạo ra âm nhạc chất lượng cao từ mô tả văn bản với độ phong phú âm thanh vượt trội. Hỗ trợ nhiều thể loại, remix và mở rộng bài hát hiện có.

zh.shortDesc: 超高质量AI音乐生成 — 以更丰富的音效与Suno竞争。
zh.fullDesc: Udio从文字描述生成卓越音质的高品质音乐。支持多种流派、混音和扩展现有歌曲。

tools.name: NotebookLM
tools.shortDesc: Upload your documents and have an AI that's grounded 100% in your sources.
tools.fullDesc: NotebookLM by Google is a research assistant that only answers from the documents you upload — no hallucinations from training data. Its viral "Audio Overview" feature converts any document into a natural-sounding two-host podcast episode.

info.label: Documents supported
info.value: PDF, Docs, Slides, URLs, YouTube

info.label: Context
info.value: Up to 500 sources / 25M tokens

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free (NotebookLM Plus coming)

features: Answers grounded entirely in your uploaded sources — no hallucinations
Audio Overview: generates a 2-host podcast from any document
Add YouTube videos, PDFs, Google Docs, websites
Automatic source citations for every claim
Study guides, briefing docs, FAQ generation

demo.title: Open NotebookLM
demo.desc: Go to notebooklm.google.com — free with any Google account.

demo.title: Create a notebook
demo.desc: Click "New Notebook" and upload your sources: PDFs, paste text, add URLs or YouTube links.

demo.title: Ask questions
demo.desc: Ask anything about your sources. Every answer includes inline citations with exact quotes.

demo.title: Generate an Audio Overview
demo.desc: Click "Audio Overview" in the right panel — your documents become a 10-20 minute podcast in minutes.

prompts.label: Research summary
prompts.text: Summarize the key findings across all my uploaded papers. What are the main themes, agreements, and contradictions between sources?

prompts.label: Briefing doc
prompts.text: Create a concise executive briefing document from these sources. 1-page format: context, key facts, implications, and recommended actions.

pricing.note: NotebookLM is currently free. NotebookLM Plus (for larger teams and higher limits) is in preview for Google One subscribers.

vi.shortDesc: Tải tài liệu lên và có AI chỉ biết về nội dung của bạn — trả lời với trích dẫn chính xác.
vi.fullDesc: NotebookLM của Google cho phép bạn upload tài liệu và đặt câu hỏi với AI được grounded 100% vào nội dung đó. Không hallucinate, mọi câu trả lời đều có trích dẫn nguồn.

zh.shortDesc: 上传文档，让AI仅基于您的内容回答 — 带精确引用来源。
zh.fullDesc: Google的NotebookLM让您上传文档，并向完全基于该内容的AI提问。不产生幻觉，每个答案都有来源引用。

tools.name: Lovable
tools.shortDesc: Build production-ready full-stack apps from prompts — the #1 vibe coding platform.
tools.fullDesc: Lovable is the fastest-growing AI app builder — millions of apps built. It generates full-stack web apps (React frontend + Supabase backend + auth) from plain English. Unlike Bolt or Replit, Lovable ships production-ready apps with databases, auth, and deployment baked in.

info.label: Models
info.value: Lovable (AI app builder using React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase backend; generates full-stack web applications)

info.label: Context
info.value: Free plan: 5 daily credits (30/month max); Pro: $25/month (100 monthly credits + 5 daily); Business: $50/month (100 monthly credits + enterprise features); Enterprise: Custom pricing

info.label: Released
info.value: Lovable credit system updated July 2025 to granular consumption model; current pricing structure as of May 2026

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free: $0 (5 daily credits); Pro: $25/month (100 credits); Business: $50/month; Additional credits available; Cloud hosting billed separately; Simple changes ~0.5 credits, complex features ~1.2-2+ credits

features: Full-stack generation: frontend + backend + database + auth
Supabase integration: real database, real-time, file storage
Built-in authentication out of the box
GitHub sync: push and pull code at any time
Custom domain deployment in one click
Visual editor: modify UI without prompting

demo.title: Sign up at Lovable
demo.desc: Go to lovable.dev — free plan gives 5 messages per day.

demo.title: Describe your app
demo.desc: Type what you want to build. Be specific about features.
demo.code:
Build a project management tool with:
- User authentication (signup/login)
- Create and assign tasks
- Kanban board with drag-and-drop
- Due dates and priority labels
- Team collaboration

demo.title: Connect Supabase
demo.desc: Click "Connect Supabase" to add a real database — Lovable sets up all tables automatically.

demo.title: Deploy
demo.desc: Click "Publish" for an instant production URL. Connect your own domain for free.

prompts.label: SaaS MVP
prompts.text: Build a subscription-based SaaS for freelancers to track time and generate invoices. Features: timer, client list, project tracking, invoice PDF generation, Stripe payments, user auth.

prompts.label: Community app
prompts.text: Build a community forum: user signup/login, create topics and replies, upvote system, user profiles, search, and moderator controls. Clean minimal design.

pricing.note: Messages are consumed per AI generation. Free plan resets daily. Paid plans give monthly message pools and remove limits on project count and collaborators.

vi.shortDesc: Xây dựng ứng dụng fullstack production-ready từ prompt — #1 về UI đẹp với React.
vi.fullDesc: Lovable là công cụ xây dựng app AI nổi tiếng với giao diện đẹp và code sạch. Tạo fullstack app với React, Supabase backend và deploy tự động, phù hợp cả người không biết code.

zh.shortDesc: 从提示词构建生产就绪全栈应用 — React UI美观度第一。
zh.fullDesc: Lovable是以美观界面和干净代码著称的AI应用构建工具。创建带有React和Supabase后端的全栈应用，自动部署，适合不懂编程的用户。

tools.name: n8n
tools.shortDesc: Open-source workflow automation with native AI nodes — the developer-friendly Zapier.
tools.fullDesc: n8n is an open-source workflow automation tool that combines visual workflow building with code capability. Its native AI nodes let you build AI agents, chain LLM calls, and create complex automations that interact with 400+ apps. Self-hostable for full data control.

info.label: Models
info.value: n8n is a workflow automation platform, not a model-based service. It offers multiple deployment options: Self-hosted Community Edition (free), n8n Cloud (Starter/Pro/Business plans)

info.label: Context
info.value: n8n GmbH (Berlin-based) provides workflow automation with 400+ integrations, visual and code-based workflows, and AI agent capabilities

info.label: Released
info.value: Latest: May 14, 2026. n8n releases minor versions most weeks with semantic versioning (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH)

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Self-hosted Community: Free (unlimited executions). Cloud - Starter: €24/mo (2,500 executions), Pro: €60/mo (10,000 executions), Business: €800/mo (40,000 executions). Startup plan: €333/mo with all Business features

features: Visual workflow builder with code escape hatch
Native AI Agent node: build autonomous agents
Chain LLM calls with memory and tools
Self-hostable: run on your own server for free
HTTP Request node: connect to any API

demo.title: Self-host n8n
demo.desc: Run n8n locally in seconds with Docker.
demo.code:
docker run -it --rm \
  --name n8n \
  -p 5678:5678 \
  n8nio/n8n

demo.title: Or use n8n Cloud
demo.desc: Sign up at n8n.io for the managed cloud version with a free 14-day trial.

demo.title: Build an AI workflow
demo.desc: Add an AI Agent node, connect it to your LLM (OpenAI/Claude), give it tools (email, calendar, HTTP), and deploy.

demo.title: Connect apps
demo.desc: Browse the 400+ integrations. Use credentials manager to store API keys securely.

prompts.label: AI agent workflow
prompts.text: Build an n8n workflow that: (1) receives a webhook when a new support ticket arrives, (2) uses GPT-4o to classify urgency and generate a response, (3) sends the response via email, (4) logs to Notion.

prompts.label: Data pipeline
prompts.text: Create a workflow that runs daily: fetches sales data from our API, processes it with code, generates a summary using Claude, and posts it to our Slack #analytics channel.

pricing.note: Self-hosting is completely free with no limits. Cloud plans are billed per workflow execution. Fair-code license allows free self-hosting for most commercial uses.

vi.shortDesc: Tự động hóa workflow mã nguồn mở với AI node native — giải pháp Make/Zapier cho developer.
vi.fullDesc: n8n là nền tảng tự động hóa workflow mã nguồn mở với giao diện kéo thả và hỗ trợ AI node native. Có thể self-host, hỗ trợ 400+ integration và logic phức tạp hơn Zapier.

zh.shortDesc: 带原生AI节点的开源工作流自动化 — 开发者版Make/Zapier。
zh.fullDesc: n8n是带拖拽界面和原生AI节点支持的开源工作流自动化平台。可自托管，支持400+集成和比Zapier更复杂的逻辑。

tools.name: Claude Code
tools.shortDesc: Anthropic's terminal-native coding agent — understands and rewrites entire codebases.
tools.fullDesc: Claude Code is Anthropic's answer to Devin and Codex CLI: a terminal-based agentic tool that reads your entire codebase, understands the full context, and can autonomously plan and execute complex engineering tasks — refactoring, feature building, bug fixing — across thousands of files.

info.label: Models
info.value: Claude Opus 4.7 (flagship), Claude Sonnet 4.6 (daily driver), Claude Haiku 4.5 (budget tasks)

info.label: Context
info.value: 1M token context window (available via API and subscriptions)

info.label: Released
info.value: Claude Opus 4.7 in May 2026; Claude Code v2.1.128–v2.1.136 released May 4–8, 2026

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Pro: $20/month (or $17/month annual); Max 5x: $100/month; Max 20x: $200/month. API: Opus 4.7 at $5 input/$25 output per million tokens; Sonnet 4.6 at $3/$15; Haiku 4.5 at $0.80/$4

features: Reads and understands your entire codebase
Autonomous execution: writes, edits, tests, fixes
Git integration: creates branches and commits
Works best with Claude Max ($100/mo) subscription

demo.title: Install Claude Code
demo.desc: Install via npm globally.
demo.code:
npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
claude --version

demo.title: Authenticate
demo.desc: Log in with your Anthropic account or API key.
demo.code:
claude auth login
# or
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...

demo.title: Run in your project
demo.desc: Navigate to your repo and start a session.
demo.code:
cd my-project
claude
> Add dark mode support to the entire app

demo.title: Let it work autonomously
demo.desc: Claude Code plans the changes, creates a branch, edits files, runs tests, and reports back. Use /review to see a diff before committing.

prompts.label: Feature build
prompts.text: Add user authentication to this Express app. Use JWT + bcrypt, create login/signup endpoints, protect all /api routes, add refresh token support, and write integration tests.

prompts.label: Codebase refactor
prompts.text: Analyze the entire codebase and refactor it to use TypeScript. Convert all .js files, add proper types, fix any type errors, and update the build config.

pricing.note: Claude Code uses the Anthropic API. Most users find Claude Max ($100/mo with 5x usage limits) to be the most cost-effective for heavy Claude Code usage.

plans.name: Claude Pro
features: Can hit limits on large tasks

plans.name: Claude Max
features: Best for heavy Claude Code use

vi.shortDesc: Agent lập trình trong terminal của Anthropic — hiểu và thực thi tác vụ coding phức tạp.
vi.fullDesc: Claude Code là agent lập trình của Anthropic chạy trong terminal, có thể đọc toàn bộ codebase và thực thi các tác vụ phức tạp. Được đánh giá cao nhất về khả năng theo dõi ngữ cảnh dài.

zh.shortDesc: Anthropic的终端原生编程代理 — 理解并执行复杂编程任务。
zh.fullDesc: Claude Code是Anthropic在终端中运行的编程代理，能读取整个代码库并执行复杂任务。在长上下文跟踪能力方面评价最高。

tools.name: Perplexity Deep Research
tools.shortDesc: Autonomous multi-step research agent that generates comprehensive reports with sources.
tools.fullDesc: Perplexity Deep Research is an autonomous research agent that runs dozens of web searches, synthesizes findings from 20+ sources, and produces a detailed, cited research report — all in 5-10 minutes. Dramatically faster than manual research.

info.value: Autonomous research agent

info.label: Sources per report

info.label: Time per report
info.value: 5-10 minutes

features: Runs 20-50 independent web searches per report
Synthesizes across academic papers, news, and forums
Produces structured reports with full citations
Follows up on promising leads autonomously
Export to PDF or share as Perplexity Page
Works with Sonar Pro model for highest quality

demo.desc: Get a fully cited report. Export to PDF, share as a Perplexity Page, or ask follow-up questions.

zh.shortDesc: 连接8000多个应用并构建无代码AI工作流。

tools.name: Make (Integromat)
tools.shortDesc: Visual workflow automation with more power and flexibility than Zapier — at lower cost.
tools.fullDesc: Make (formerly Integromat) is the most powerful visual workflow automation platform. Its drag-and-drop canvas handles complex multi-branch logic, data transformation, and error handling that Zapier struggles with — all at 2-5x lower cost per operation.

info.label: Pricing

features: Visual canvas: see data flowing through every step in real time
Complex logic: routers, iterators, aggregators, error handlers
Data transformation: built-in JSON, math, text, and date functions
Webhooks included on free plan (Zapier charges for them)
Make AI: AI steps for text generation and classification
5x more operations per dollar vs Zapier

prompts.label: Complex data flow

pricing.note: An "operation" is one module execution. A 5-module scenario running 200 times = 1,000 operations. Much better value than Zapier for power users.

vi.shortDesc: Tự động hóa workflow trực quan với sức mạnh và linh hoạt hơn Zapier.

tools.name: GPT-5
tools.shortDesc: OpenAI's flagship 2026 model — 400K context, native multimodal, computer use, and configurable reasoning.
tools.fullDesc: GPT-5 represents a decisive leap over the GPT-4 era. Released throughout 2025 and into 2026, it features configurable reasoning effort, native multimodal input (text, image, audio), a 400K context window, and native computer use. The March 2026 GPT-5.4 release unified general-purpose and coding lines into a single flagship model.

info.label: Models
info.value: <cite index="13-1">GPT-5.5 is the latest model released by OpenAI on April 23, 2026</cite>. <cite index="4-11">GPT-5.5 for highest-quality work, GPT-5.4 for a lower-cost frontier option, and GPT-5.4 mini/nano for routed production traffic are the current primary offerings</cite>.

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="9-4">GPT-5.5 features a 1M+ token context window (922K input, 128K output) with support for text and image inputs</cite>.

info.label: Released
info.value: <cite index="13-1">GPT-5.5 was released on April 23, 2026</cite>.

info.label: Pricing

features: Configurable reasoning effort — dial up compute for hard tasks, save on simple ones
Native multimodal: text, image, and audio in a single request
400K context window — process entire codebases or long documents
Computer use: natively interacts with applications and browsers
GPT-5.4 unifies general-purpose and coding model lines
90%+ MMLU-Pro score — among the highest in the industry
Available via ChatGPT, API, Azure OpenAI, and Microsoft Copilot

tools.name: Sunday Robots
tools.shortDesc: AI-powered household robot that learns from real-world human demonstrations to handle everyday chores autonomously.
tools.fullDesc: Sunday Robots (Memo) is an autonomous household robot engineered to help families with chores like dishes, laundry, and tidying. Trained on 10 million real-world household episodes from 500+ homes using the proprietary Skill Capture Glove, Memo learns human movements and replicates them with precision. The robot combines a stable wheeled base with dual grippers and AI models (ACT-1 foundation) to perform complex, multi-step tasks in unpredictable home environments.

info.label: Models
info.value: Memo (single model)

info.label: Context
info.value: Wheeled home robot powered by ACT-1 foundation model, trained on real household data from 500+ homes. Can clear tables, load dishwashers, fold laundry, and brew espresso.

info.label: Released
info.value: Not yet commercially available. 2026 Founding Family beta with 50 households planned for Fall 2026

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Current hand-built cost: ~$20,000. Target retail price under $10,000 at scale

features: Trained on 10 million real-world household episodes from 500+ homes using proprietary Skill Capture Glove
ACT-1 foundation model using imitation learning and diffusion policy for dexterous manipulation
Autonomous operation without teleoperation; learns directly from human demonstrations
Multi-gripper design with precision control for handling fragile items like wine glasses
Wheeled base with telescoping spine reaching 7 feet; stable and safe for families with children
Can perform dishes, laundry, espresso-making, table clearing, and multi-step household tasks
Soft silicone-clad design with passive stability (remains stable during power loss)
Skill Transform pipeline converts human glove data to robot-compatible actions with 90% success rate

Beta program (50 households) launches late 2026 on invitation-only basis; full consumer availability expected post-beta.

vi.shortDesc: Robot gia đình được hỗ trợ bởi AI, học từ các hành động thực tế của con người để tự động xử lý các công việc hàng ngày.
vi.fullDesc: Sunday Robots (Memo) là một robot gia đình tự động được thiết kế để giúp các gia đình với các công việc như rửa chén, giặt là và dọn dẹp. Được đào tạo trên 10 triệu tập phim gia đình thực tế từ hơn 500 ngôi nhà bằng Skill Capture Glove độc quyền, Memo học các chuyển động của con người và sao chép chúng với độ chính xác cao. Robot kết hợp nền tảng bánh xe ổn định với hai tay nắm kép và các mô hình AI (nền tảng ACT-1) để thực hiện các nhiệm vụ phức tạp, đa bước trong các môi trường gia đình không thể dự đoán được.

zh.shortDesc: 由人工智能驱动的家用机器人，通过学习真实人类演示来自主处理日常家务。
zh.fullDesc: Sunday Robots（Memo）是一款自主家用机器人，旨在帮助家庭完成洗碗、洗衣和��理等家务。通过使用专有的Skill Capture Glove从500多个家庭的1000万真实家务数据集中进行训练，Memo学习人类的动作并以精确度复制这些动作。该机器人结合了稳定的轮式底座、双臂夹持器和AI模型（ACT-1基础），能够在不可预测的家庭环境中完成复杂的多步任务。

tools.name: Livedocs
tools.shortDesc: AI-native IDE combining SQL, Python, and natural language for instant data insights.
tools.fullDesc: Livedocs is a modern notebook platform that transforms raw data into actionable insights using AI. Unlike traditional notebooks, cells automatically re-run when dependencies change, and users can analyze data through SQL, Python, or natural language queries, then publish interactive dashboards without coding.

info.label: Type
info.value: AI-Native Data Analysis IDE

info.label: Best for
info.value: Data analysts, engineers, and non-technical teams needing instant insights

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Freemium: $0-$30+ per workspace/month

features: AI agent that understands data context and generates SQL/Python code automatically
Reactive notebooks with dependency tracking like spreadsheets
Real-time collaboration with team members in shared workspaces
Built-in SQL, Python, and chart creation in a single IDE
Publish interactive dashboards and shareable apps without deployment code
Connect live data from databases, APIs, and services like Stripe and Google Analytics
Natural language interface to ask questions and get charts instantly
Terminal access and machine learning capabilities for advanced analysis

vi.fullDesc: Livedocs là nền tảng notebook hiện đại biến dữ liệu thô thành những thông tin hữu ích hành động bằng AI. Khác với các notebook truyền thống, các cell tự động chạy lại khi phụ thuộc thay đổi, và người dùng có thể phân tích dữ liệu thông qua các truy vấn SQL, Python hoặc ngôn ngữ tự nhiên, sau đó xuất bản dashboard tương tác mà không cần viết code.

zh.shortDesc: 原生AI IDE，结合SQL、Python和自然语言，提供即时数据洞察。
zh.fullDesc: Livedocs是一个现代化笔记本平台，利用AI将原始数据转化为可操作的洞察。与传统笔记本不同，当依赖项改变时，单元格会自动重新运行，用户可以通过SQL、Python或自然语言查询分析数据，然后无需编码即可发布交互式仪表板。

tools.name: Primitive
tools.shortDesc: AI agent operating system for regulated financial institutions with enterprise governance and compliance.
tools.fullDesc: Primitive is an enterprise AI agent operating system purpose-built for regulated financial institutions to create, deploy, and govern agentic execution at scale. It provides bank-grade controls, third-party integrations, and measurable ROI frameworks to move AI from pilots to production workloads. The platform is designed for operations teams seeking to deploy accountable, auditable AI agents across banking workflows.

The Assembler rapidly builds production-ready agents from use cases in approximately 90 days
The Control Tower delivers comprehensive governance through logging, tracing, and compliance validation
Pre-built agent templates for commercial lending, operations, risk/compliance, and regulatory oversight
Agent Capital framework and Return on Agent Capital (ROAC) metrics for quantifying AI value
MX partnership enables AI-native Growth Agent for deposit identification and personalized banking campaigns

vi.shortDesc: Hệ điều hành AI agent cho các tổ chức tài chính được quản lý với quản trị doanh nghiệp và tuân thủ.
vi.fullDesc: Primitive là hệ điều hành AI agent cấp doanh nghiệp được xây dựng đặc biệt cho các tổ chức tài chính được quản lý nhằm tạo, triển khai và quản lý thực thi agent quy mô lớn. Nó cung cấp các điều khiển cấp ngân hàng, tích hợp bên thứ ba và khung ROI có thể đo lường để chuyển AI từ các dự án thí điểm sang khối lượng công việc sản xuất. Nền tảng được thiết kế cho các đội vận hành tìm cách triển khai các agent AI có trách nhiệm và có thể kiểm toán trên các quy trình làm việc ngân hàng.

zh.shortDesc: 为受监管金融机构设计的AI代理操作系统，具有企业治理和合规功能。
zh.fullDesc: Primitive是专为受监管金融机构设计的企业级AI代理操作系统，用于大规模创建、部署和管理代理执行。它提供银行级控制、第三方集成和可衡量的ROI框架，将AI从试点项目转移到生产工作负载。该平台为寻求在银行工作流程中部署可追踪、可审计的AI代理的运营团队而设计。

tools.name: Google AI Edge Eloquent
tools.shortDesc: Advanced offline dictation app that transforms messy speech into professional text using Google's Gemma AI.
tools.fullDesc: Google AI Edge Eloquent is an offline-first dictation app powered by Google's Gemma models that automatically transforms natural speech into polished, professional text. It filters out filler words and self-corrections while maintaining context and meaning. Perfect for professionals, writers, and anyone looking to capture thoughts quickly without manual editing.

Automatic filtering of filler words like 'um' and 'uh' plus self-corrections for clean prose
Real-time transcription display with live waveform visualization as you dictate

Personal context dictionary that learns from your vocabulary and Gmail contacts for accuracy
Optional cloud mode using Gemini models for enhanced text polishing on complex sentences
Session history tracking with performance stats including words-per-minute and word count
Direct clipboard export for seamless pasting into other apps

tools.name: Poke
tools.shortDesc: AI agent accessible via iMessage, SMS, and Telegram for everyday automation without complex setup.
tools.fullDesc: Poke is a messaging-first AI agent that brings agentic AI to everyday users through familiar text interfaces. It handles calendar management, email alerts, health tracking, smart home control, photo editing, and custom automations through plain-text conversations, designed for non-technical users who want task automation without learning terminal commands or installing new apps.

info.label: Models
info.value: Poke uses multiple AI models from different providers rather than being tied to one ecosystem, selecting the best model for each specific task

info.label: Context
info.value: Poke is a text-first AI assistant accessible via iMessage, SMS, Telegram, and WhatsApp that integrates with email, calendar, and files to help with everyday tasks like calendar management, health tracking, smart home control, and photo editing

info.label: Released
info.value: Publicly launched in March 2026

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free to start; usage-based pricing for real-time automations. During beta, users negotiated personalized pricing ranging from $0-$30/month based on usage patterns

features: Accessible via iMessage, SMS, Telegram, and WhatsApp (select markets)
Pre-built "recipes" for automation across productivity, health, finance, travel, and developer tools
User-authored automations shareable with plain-text syntax
Real-time integrations with Gmail, Google Calendar, Outlook, Notion, Linear, GitHub, and 30+ other services
Proactive alerts and reminders without manual prompting
Multi-layered security with SOC 2 Type II, CASA Tier 2, and regular penetration testing
Privacy-first design where team cannot access token content by default
Creator economy incentives: $0.10-$1.00 per user signup for shared recipes

vi.shortDesc: Tác nhân AI có thể truy cập qua iMessage, SMS và Telegram để tự động hóa hàng ngày mà không cần cấu hình phức tạp.

Nó xử lý quản lý lịch, cảnh báo email, theo dõi sức khỏe, điều khiển nhà thông minh, chỉnh sửa ảnh và tự động hóa tùy chỉnh thông qua các cuộc trò chuyện văn bản thuần túy, được thiết kế cho những người dùng không chuyên về kỹ thuật muốn tự động hóa tác vụ mà không cần học các lệnh terminal hoặc cài đặt ứng dụng mới.

tools.shortDesc: AI tool that turns text prompts into interactive prototypes and presentations.
tools.fullDesc: <cite index="6-12">Claude Design is a new Anthropic Labs product that lets you collaborate with Claude to create polished visual work like designs, prototypes, slides, one-pagers, and more.</cite> <cite index="2-5">It is aimed at empowering company founders, product managers, and marketers to create professional designs and prototypes without needing a deep background in design.</cite> <cite index="6-13">Claude Design is powered by Claude Opus 4.7 and is available in research preview for Claude Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise subscribers.</cite>

features: <cite index="1-4,1-5">Ask for a signup page, pricing screen, or pitch slide, and Claude Design generates a first draft, which users can refine through chat-style instructions, in-canvas comments, direct edits, or custom sliders.</cite>
<cite index="6-2,6-3">Claude builds a design system for your team by reading your codebase and design files, automatically applying your colors, typography, and components to every project.</cite>

<cite index="5-3,5-4">Users can start from a text prompt, upload images and documents in various formats, point Claude at their codebase, or use a web capture tool to grab elements directly from a live website.</cite>

<cite index="5-6,5-7">When a design is ready to build, Claude packages everything into a handoff bundle that can be passed to Claude Code, creating a closed loop from exploration to prototype to production code.</cite>
<cite index="8-14">Designs can be shared as an internal URL within an organization, saved as a folder, or exported to Canva, PDF, PPTX, or standalone HTML files.</cite>
<cite index="3-11">Users can select an on-screen element and leave a comment for Claude, which immediately begins working on it.</cite>
<cite index="2-8">Claude Design provides features that allow multiple team members to access and edit the design together.</cite>
<cite index="4-11">It supports tasks like wireframing, prototyping and animation while maintaining alignment with brand guidelines.</cite>

tools.name: GPT-Rosalind
tools.shortDesc: <cite index="1-1">OpenAI's frontier reasoning model built to accelerate drug discovery, genomics analysis, protein reasoning, and scientific research workflows.</cite>
tools.fullDesc: <cite index="2-2">GPT-Rosalind is designed for advanced biological reasoning, scientific tool use, and multi-step workflows such as target discovery, target validation, genomics interpretation, pathway analysis, literature synthesis, and hypothesis generation.</cite> <cite index="2-3">The model is currently most useful for early discovery work, especially target biology, mechanism understanding, literature synthesis, and omics interpretation.</cite> <cite index="1-5">OpenAI is working with leading pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and research customers, as well as life sciences technology organizations, to apply GPT-Rosalind across workflows that drive discovery.</cite>

info.label: Type
info.value: Frontier Reasoning Model for Life Sciences

info.label: Released
info.value: April 2026

info.label: Best for
info.value: Drug discovery, protein engineering, genomics analysis, hypothesis generation

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Research preview for eligible Enterprise customers

features: <cite index="4-1">Synthesizes evidence, generates biological hypotheses, and plans experiments—tasks that have traditionally required years of expert human synthesis.</cite>

<cite index="1-9">Evaluates core reasoning across scientific subdomains, including chemical reaction mechanisms; protein structure, mutation effects, and interactions; and phylogenetic interpretation of DNA sequences.</cite>
<cite index="4-3">Fine-tuned for deeper understanding across genomics, protein engineering, and chemistry.</cite>
<cite index="1-18">Includes a freely accessible Life Sciences research plugin for Codex, helping scientists connect models to over 50 scientific tools and data sources.</cite>
<cite index="2-10">Delivers enterprise-grade security controls and Regulated Workspaces with BAAs, SOC 2 Type 2 and HIPAA-aligned standards.</cite>

<cite index="1-10">Supports real research workflows by interpreting experimental outputs, identifying expert-relevant patterns, and synthesizing external information to design follow-up experiments.</cite>
<cite index="4-6">Outperformed comparison models on CloningQA—a task requiring end-to-end design of reagents for molecular cloning protocols.</cite>
<cite index="2-11">OpenAI does not train on customer data.</cite>

vi.shortDesc: <cite index="1-1">Mô hình lập luận tiên tiến của OpenAI được xây dựng để tăng tốc độ khám phá thuốc, phân tích genomics, lập luận protein và các quy trình nghiên cứu khoa học.</cite>
vi.fullDesc: <cite index="2-2">GPT-Rosalind được thiết kế cho lập luận sinh học nâng cao, sử dụng công cụ khoa học và các quy trình đa bước như khám phá mục tiêu, xác thực mục tiêu, giải thích genomics, phân tích con đường, tổng hợp tài liệu và tạo giả thuyết.</cite> <cite index="2-3">Mô hình hiện tại hữu ích nhất cho công việc khám phá sớm, đặc biệt là sinh học mục tiêu, hiểu biết cơ chế, tổng hợp tài liệu và giải thích omics.</cite> <cite index="1-5">OpenAI đang hợp tác với các khách hàng dược phẩm, công nghệ sinh học và nghiên cứu hàng đầu, cũng như các tổ chức công nghệ khoa học sự sống, để áp dụng GPT-Rosalind trên các quy trình thúc đẩy khám phá.</cite>

zh.shortDesc: <cite index="1-1">OpenAI 的前沿推理模型，旨在加速药���发现、基因组学分析、蛋白质推理和科学研究工作流。</cite>
zh.fullDesc: <cite index="2-2">GPT-Rosalind 专为高级生物推理、科学工具应用和多步骤工作流设计，包括靶点发现、靶点验证、基因组学解读、通路分析、文献合成和假设生成。</cite> <cite index="2-3">该模型目前最适用于早期发现工作，尤其是靶点生物学、机制理解、文献合成和组学解读。</cite> <cite index="1-5">OpenAI 正与领先的制药、生物技术和研究客户以及生命科学技术组织合作，在推动发现的工作流中应用 GPT-Rosalind。</cite>

tools.name: MangroveGS
tools.shortDesc: AI system that predicts cancer metastasis risk from gene expression patterns with 80% accuracy.
tools.fullDesc: <cite index="1-4">MangroveGS studies complex gene activity patterns to calculate the chances of a tumour spreading to other parts of the body.</cite> <cite index="2-7">The tool points toward more precise care: sparing low-risk patients from aggressive therapies while making sure high-risk patients are monitored and treated more intensively.</cite> <cite index="2-11,2-12">Currently, MangroveGS is a research tool, not a standard clinical test, and the Geneva team's findings will need to be confirmed in larger groups of patients and across more cancer types.</cite>

info.label: Type
info.value: Machine Learning Model for Cancer Prediction

info.label: Best for
info.value: Cancer metastasis risk prediction and personalized treatment planning

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Research tool (Academic use)

features: <cite index="2-19">Exploits dozens, even hundreds, of gene signatures simultaneously.</cite>
<cite index="2-21">Achieves nearly 80% accuracy in predicting whether colon cancer would metastasize or recur.</cite>
<cite index="1-13">Gene signatures identified in colon cancer can help predict the risk of metastasis in stomach, lung, and breast cancers.</cite>
<cite index="6-10">Processes RNA sequencing data from tumor samples and provides a metastasis risk score through a secure platform.</cite>
<cite index="1-11">Designed to remain effective even if there are changes in the genes.</cite>
<cite index="1-15">Doctors only need access to the tumour tissue sample to analyse gene activity and calculate metastasis risk.</cite>
<cite index="2-14">Gene signatures could point scientists toward new drug targets—genes or pathways that, if blocked, might prevent cancer cells from spreading.</cite>

vi.fullDesc: <cite index="1-4">MangroveGS nghiên cứu các mẫu hoạt động gen phức tạp để tính toán khả năng một khối u lan sang các bộ phận khác của cơ thể.</cite> <cite index="2-7">Công cụ này hướng tới chăm sóc chính xác hơn: tránh những liệu pháp tấn công mạnh đối với bệnh nhân nguy cơ thấp trong khi đảm bảo bệnh nhân nguy cơ cao được theo dõi và điều trị chuyên sâu hơn.</cite> <cite index="2-11,2-12">Hiện tại, MangroveGS là một công cụ nghiên cứu, không phải là một xét nghiệm lâm sàng tiêu chuẩn, và những phát hiện của nhóm Geneva sẽ cần được xác nhận trên các nhóm bệnh nhân lớn hơn và trên nhiều loại ung thư khác.</cite>

zh.shortDesc: AI系统可根据基因表达模式预测癌症转移风险，准确率达80%。
zh.fullDesc: <cite index="1-4">MangroveGS研究复杂的基���活动模式，以计算肿瘤扩散到身体其他部位的可能性。</cite> <cite index="2-7">该工具有助于提供更精准的治疗方案：使低风险患者避免接受侵袭性治疗，同时确保高风险患者得到更加密集的监测和治疗。</cite> <cite index="2-11,2-12">目前，MangroveGS是一个研究工具而非标准临床检测，日内瓦研究团队的研究成果需要在更大规模患者群体和更多癌症类型中得到验证。</cite>

tools.name: Gemma 4
tools.shortDesc: Google's most capable open-source LLM family with native multimodal support and advanced reasoning for edge-to-enterprise deployment.
tools.fullDesc: Gemma 4 is Google DeepMind's most intelligent open model family, built from Gemini 3 research. Available in four sizes (E2B, E4B, 26B MoE, 31B Dense), it delivers frontier-level reasoning and agentic capabilities with native support for text, images, video, and audio. Designed for developers building privacy-first applications, on-device AI agents, and enterprise workflows requiring complete data sovereignty.

features: Four model sizes (E2B 2B, E4B 4B, 26B MoE with 3.8B active, 31B Dense) optimized for devices to servers
Native multimodal input: text, images (variable resolution), video, audio on small models
Built-in reasoning with configurable thinking modes for step-by-step problem solving
Native function calling and structured output support for autonomous agents
Strong coding performance with code generation, completion, and correction
Multilingual support for 140+ languages with variable aspect ratio image processing
Apache 2.0 licensed for unrestricted commercial use, fine-tuning, and deployment

tools.name: Cohere Transcribe
tools.shortDesc: <cite index="1-2">Open-weights Conformer ASR model converting speech audio into text across 14 supported languages.</cite>
tools.fullDesc: <cite index="14-3,14-4">Cohere Transcribe is the latest standard for English speech recognition accuracy, leading the HuggingFace Open ASR Leaderboard with an average word error rate of just 5.42%.</cite> <cite index="1-5">Transcribe converts your business' audio data into precise text for search, analytics, and automation.</cite> <cite index="4-3">This dedicated transcription model was trained from scratch to support 14 enterprise-critical languages, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy while maintaining high efficiency, with an offline throughput three times higher than similarly sized competitors.</cite>

info.label: Type
info.value: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) Model

info.label: Released
info.value: March 2026

info.label: Best for
info.value: Meeting transcription, call center analytics, speech analytics, voice-enabled applications

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free API access with rate limits; Model Vault for production deployment with custom pricing

features: <cite index="4-31">Supports 14 languages: English, German, French, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, Greek, Dutch, Polish, Arabic, Vietnamese, Chinese (Mandarin), Japanese and Korean.</cite>

<cite index="13-4">Ranks #1 on the English ASR leaderboard as of March 2026, achieving a 5.42 average Word Error Rate (WER) across 8 benchmarks — while running at 524x real-time speed (RTFx), roughly 3x faster than comparable models.</cite>
<cite index="20-2">Automatic processing of long audio files; audio files longer than 35 seconds are automatically segmented into overlapping segments and reassembled.</cite>

<cite index="15-10,15-11,15-12">Built on a speech-optimized Conformer architecture; input audio waveforms are converted into a mel-spectrogram and processed by a Conformer encoder that holds the majority of the model's parameters, with representations passed to a lightweight Transformer decoder that generates text tokens.</cite>
<cite index="4-2">Released as a 2B-parameter model open-sourced on huggingface under an Apache 2.0 licence.</cite>
<cite index="1-24,1-27,1-28">Available for local deployment or edge environments, with Model Vault enabling low-latency, private cloud inference without having to manage infrastructure.</cite>

<cite index="19-12">In human evaluation on English transcription, achieved a 61% average win rate across criteria including meaning preservation, hallucination prevention, and named entity recognition.</cite>
<cite index="12-10,12-13">Customizable punctuation in the prompt at inference time, with default punctuation of all transcripts.</cite>

demo.title: Install Dependencies
demo.desc: Set up the required Python packages for running Cohere Transcribe locally
demo.code: pip install transformers>=5.4.0 torch huggingface_hub soundfile librosa sentencepiece protobuf

demo.title: Load Model and Processor
demo.desc: Initialize the Cohere Transcribe model and audio processor from Hugging Face
demo.code:
from transformers import AutoProcessor, CohereAsrForConditionalGeneration
processor = AutoProcessor.from_pretrained('CohereLabs/cohere-transcribe-03-2026')
model = CohereAsrForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained('CohereLabs/cohere-transcribe-03-2026', device_map='auto')

demo.title: Process Audio and Transcribe
demo.desc: Load audio file, prepare inputs, and generate transcription
demo.code:
from transformers.audio_utils import load_audio
audio = load_audio('path/to/audio.wav', sampling_rate=16000)
inputs = processor(audio, sampling_rate=16000, return_tensors='pt', language='en')
outputs = model.generate(**inputs, max_new_tokens=256)
text = processor.decode(outputs, skip_special_tokens=True)

vi.shortDesc: <cite index="1-2">Mô hình ASR Conformer trọng số mở chuyển đổi âm thanh nói thành văn bản trên 14 ngôn ngữ được hỗ trợ.</cite>
vi.fullDesc: <cite index="14-3,14-4">Cohere Transcribe là tiêu chuẩn mới nhất cho độ chính xác nhận dạng tiếng Anh, dẫn đầu Bảng xếp hạng ASR mở HuggingFace với tỷ lệ lỗi từ trung bình chỉ 5,42%.</cite> <cite index="1-5">Transcribe chuyển đổi dữ liệu âm thanh của doanh nghiệp bạn thành văn bản chính xác để tìm kiếm, phân tích và tự động hóa.</cite> <cite index="4-3">Mô hình sao chép dành riêng này được huấn luyện từ đầu để hỗ trợ 14 ngôn ngữ quan trọng cho doanh nghiệp, đạt được độ chính xác tối tân trong khi duy trì hiệu suất cao, với thông lượng ngoại tuyến cao gấp ba lần các đối thủ cùng kích thước.</cite>

zh.shortDesc: <cite index="1-2">开放权重 Conformer ASR 模型，支持 14 种语言的语音音频转文本。</cite>
zh.fullDesc: <cite index="14-3,14-4">Cohere Transcribe 是英文语音识别精度的最新标准，在 HuggingFace 开放 ASR 排行榜中领先，平均字错率仅为 5.42%。</cite> <cite index="1-5">Transcribe 将您企业的音频数据转换为精确文本，用于搜索、分析和自动化。</cite> <cite index="4-3">这款专用转录模型从零开始训练，支持 14 种企业关键语言，在保持高效率的同时实现了最先进的精度，离线吞吐量是同等规模竞争对手的三倍。</cite>

It provides agents with distinct identities and granular access controls while integrating with Cloudflare Workers, Workers VPC, and the Agents SDK for end-to-end lifecycle management.

tools.name: Mercury 2
tools.shortDesc: World's fastest reasoning LLM using diffusion-based architecture for 5x faster inference.
tools.fullDesc: Mercury 2 is a diffusion-based reasoning language model that generates multiple tokens in parallel instead of sequentially, achieving over 1,000 tokens per second. Built for production AI workloads including agent loops, real-time voice, search systems, and coding assistants where latency is critical. Offers 128K context window, native tool use, and structured JSON output at a fraction of the cost of competing models.

features: Parallel token generation enabling >1,000 tokens/second throughput on NVIDIA GPUs
Diffusion-based architecture for 5x faster reasoning than competing speed-optimized models
128K token context window supporting extended conversations and documents
Native tool use and schema-aligned JSON output for structured agent orchestration
Tunable reasoning levels for flexible reasoning depth configuration
OpenAI API compatible for seamless integration into existing workflows
In-generation error correction and iterative refinement capabilities
Production-grade reliability optimized for low-latency enterprise applications

vi.shortDesc: LLM suy luận nhanh nhất thế giới sử dụng kiến trúc khuếch tán để suy luận 5x nhanh hơn.

Được xây dựng cho các khối lượng công việc AI sản xuất bao gồm vòng lặp tác nhân, giọng nói thực tế, hệ thống tìm kiếm và trợ lý mã hóa nơi độ trễ là rất quan trọng. Cung cấp cửa sổ ngữ cảnh 128K, sử dụng công cụ gốc và đầu ra JSON có cấu trúc với chi phí chỉ là một phần của các mô hình cạnh tranh.

vi.shortDesc: Trình duyệt Chromium hỗ trợ AI với trợ lý tích hợp để duyệt web thông minh và tự động hóa tác vụ.
vi.fullDesc: Perplexity Comet là một trình duyệt AI đại lý tích hợp tìm kiếm, tóm tắt và tự động hóa trực tiếp vào trải nghiệm duyệt web. Được xây dựng trên nền Chromium và được hỗ trợ bởi công cụ AI của Perplexity, nó cho phép người dùng tìm kiếm một cách tự nhiên, tóm tắt nội dung, quản lý tác vụ và tự động hóa quy trình công việc trên các tab mà không cần chuyển ứng dụng. Được thiết kế cho các chuyên gia và nhân viên kiến thức muốn có trải nghiệm duyệt web thông minh và hiệu quả hơn.

zh.shortDesc: 具有内置助手的AI原生Chromium浏览器，提供智能浏览和任务自动化。
zh.fullDesc: Perplexity Comet是一款代理AI浏览器，将搜索、总结和自动化功能直接集成到浏览体验中。基于Chromium构建，由Perplexity的AI引擎驱动，它允���用户自然搜索、总结内容、管理任务和跨标签页自动化工作流程，无需切换应用。专为寻求更智能、更高效浏览体验的专业人士和知识工作者而设计。

tools.name: Orkes Conductor
tools.shortDesc: Enterprise workflow orchestration platform for distributed systems and AI agents at scale.
tools.fullDesc: Orkes Conductor is an enterprise-grade orchestration platform built on Netflix's open-source Conductor. It enables teams to build, deploy, and manage complex distributed workflows and AI agents with built-in reliability, observability, and security. Designed for enterprises managing mission-critical workflows across microservices, APIs, and generative AI systems.

info.label: Type
info.value: Workflow Orchestration & AI Agent Runtime

info.label: Best for
info.value: Enterprise teams building distributed workflows, AI agents, and microservices orchestration

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free Developer Edition; Enterprise with cluster-based pricing (no per-execution limits)

features: Visual workflow builder with drag-and-drop interface for designing complex workflows without coding
Native agentic orchestration with LLM integration, prompt templates, and vector database support
Multi-language support for workers (Java, Python, Go, JavaScript, etc.) deployed anywhere
Built-in system tasks for HTTP, events, AI inference, database operations, and human-in-the-loop workflows
Declarative operators (Switch, Fork/Join, Do While loops) for control flow without imperative code
Enterprise security with SOC 2 Type II certification, SSO, RBAC, and secret variable management
High-availability execution with fault tolerance, automatic retries, and canary/A-B testing capabilities
Flexible deployment: Orkes Cloud, customer-hosted in your cloud account, or Docker-based local development

vi.shortDesc: Nền tảng điều phối quy trình công việc cho các hệ thống phân tán và các agent AI quy mô lớn.

Nó cho phép các đội xây dựng, triển khai và quản lý các quy trình công việc phân tán phức tạp và các agent AI với độ tin cậy, khả năng quan sát và bảo mật tích hợp sẵn. Được thiết kế cho các doanh nghiệp quản lý các quy trình công việc quan trọng trên các microservices, APIs và hệ thống AI tạo sinh.

zh.shortDesc: 用于分布式系统和大规模AI代理的企业级工作流编排平台。
zh.fullDesc: Orkes Conductor是建立在Netflix开源Conductor基础上的企业级编排平台。它使团队能够构建、部署和管理复杂的分布式工作流和AI代理，具有内置的可靠性、可观测性和安全性。专为管理跨微服务、API和生成式AI系统的关键业务工作流的企业而设计。

tools.name: Microsoft MAI Models
tools.shortDesc: Microsoft's suite of in-house multimodal AI models for transcription, voice, and image generation.
tools.fullDesc: Microsoft MAI Models is a collection of proprietary AI models including MAI-Transcribe-1 for speech-to-text, MAI-Voice-1 for high-fidelity voice synthesis, and MAI-Image-2 for text-to-image generation. Designed for enterprise developers, these models emphasize speed, cost-efficiency, and integration with Microsoft Foundry and Azure services.

info.label: Type
info.value: Multimodal AI Model Suite (Speech-to-Text, Text-to-Speech, Text-to-Image)

info.label: Released

info.label: Best for
info.value: Enterprise developers, content creation, accessibility, call center automation, voice agents, creative workflows

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Usage-based: Transcription $0.36/hour, Voice $22/million characters, Image $5-33/million tokens

features: MAI-Transcribe-1: Speech-to-text transcription across 25 languages with 2.5x faster batch processing than Azure Fast
MAI-Voice-1: Generates 60 seconds of natural, expressive audio in under one second with custom voice creation
MAI-Image-2: Top-3 ranked text-to-image model with 2x faster generation and photorealistic quality
Enterprise-grade security with Azure RBAC, Managed Identity, and compliance controls through Foundry
Integrated with Microsoft products: Copilot, Bing, PowerPoint, Teams, and Azure Speech services
Agent-first design optimized for embedding in AI agents and multi-step workflows
Responsible AI built-in with rigorous red-teaming and safe deployment guardrails

vi.shortDesc: Bộ suite các mô hình AI đa phương thức của Microsoft cho chuyên ghi âm, xử lý giọng nói và tạo hình ảnh.

tools.name: Granola
tools.shortDesc: Bot-free AI notepad that transcribes meetings and enhances your notes without visible participants.
tools.fullDesc: Granola is a privacy-first meeting notepad that captures device audio directly without joining calls as a bot. You jot notes during meetings, and Granola's AI enhances them with structured summaries, action items, and decisions. It's designed for professionals who want natural conversations without visible recording bots altering meeting dynamics.

info.label: Models
info.value: GPT-4o and Claude (advanced AI thinking models)

info.label: Context
info.value: Bot-free meeting transcription and AI-enhanced notes with team collaboration features

info.label: Released
info.value: Series C funding March 2026 ($125M at $1.5B valuation); MCP launched February 2026

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free (Basic with 30-day history limit), Business $14/user/month (unlimited history), Enterprise $35/user/month

features: Bot-free device audio capture with no visible participant joining calls
Human-AI hybrid approach: you take notes, AI enhances with context from transcript
AI-powered Recipes for generating PRDs, coaching feedback, and follow-up emails
Cross-meeting AI chat to search and query across multiple meetings
Real-time transcription powered by Deepgram, AssemblyAI, GPT-4o, and Claude
Team collaboration with shared folders, workspaces, and granular access controls
CRM integrations (Slack, Notion, HubSpot, Attio, Affinity, Zapier) on Business plan
Privacy-first design: no audio files stored, SOC 2 Type 2 certified

vi.shortDesc: Notepad AI không có bot giúp ghi âm cuộc họp và cải thiện ghi chú mà không có người tham gia hiển thị.
vi.fullDesc: Granola là một notepad cuộc họp ưu tiên bảo mật, ghi lại âm thanh thiết bị trực tiếp mà không cần tham gia cuộc gọi dưới dạng bot. Bạn ghi chú trong cuộc họp, và AI của Granola sẽ cải thiện chúng bằng cách tổng hợp có cấu trúc, các mục hành động và quyết định. Nó được thiết kế cho các chuyên gia muốn có những cuộc trò chuyện tự nhiên mà không có bot ghi âm hiển thị làm thay đổi động lực cuộc họp.

zh.shortDesc: 无机器人AI记事本，可转录会议并改进笔记，不显示参与者。
zh.fullDesc: Granola是一款隐私优先的会议记事本，可直接捕获设备音频，无需以机器人身份加入通话。您在会议期间进行记录，Granola的AI会通过结构化摘要、行动项和决策来增强您的笔记。它专为希望进行自然对话而不受可见录音机器人干扰的专业人士而设计。

tools.name: Gumloop
tools.shortDesc: AI-native automation platform for building complex workflows without coding.
tools.fullDesc: Gumloop is an AI-powered workflow automation platform that lets teams build intelligent agents and complex automations using a visual, drag-and-drop interface. It combines traditional automation with built-in AI models like GPT-4, Claude, and Gemini to enable businesses of all sizes—from solopreneurs to enterprises like Shopify and Instacart—to automate repetitive tasks, data processing, and decision-making workflows without writing code.

info.label: Models
info.value: <cite index="8-6">Access to multiple AI models from providers such as Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, and DeepSeek</cite>

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="4-1">No-code platform to automate complex tasks using AI agents that integrate with internal and external data sources</cite>

info.label: Released
info.value: <cite index="18-29">Founded in 2023</cite>

info.label: Pricing
info.value: <cite index="2-18,2-20,2-21,2-22">Free: 2,000 credits; Solo/Pro: From $37/month with 10,000-60,000+ credits; Team: From $244/month; Enterprise: Custom pricing</cite>

features: Visual drag-and-drop workflow builder with 100+ pre-built nodes and 130+ integrations
Built-in access to AI models (GPT-4, Claude, Gemini) without requiring personal API keys
AI-driven decision making and conditional logic within automation flows
Web scraping and browser automation via Chrome extension for data extraction
Team collaboration with role-based access control, audit logs, and permission management
Slack, Teams, and email integration for agent interaction like co-workers
Credit-based pricing for flexible scaling of AI processing and automation volume
SOC 2 Type II and GDPR compliance with zero-data retention agreements for third-party AI models

pricing.note: Gumloop uses a credit-based model where AI processing and automation complexity determine cost. Simple workflows are affordable; batch processing, enrichment, and multiple AI steps increase credit consumption rapidly. Free plan includes 5K credits/month, sufficient for 50-100 AI-heavy executions.

vi.shortDesc: Nền tảng tự động hóa được thiết kế cho AI, dùng để xây dựng các quy trình phức tạp mà không cần viết code.

Nó kết hợp tự động hóa truyền thống với các mô hình AI tích hợp như GPT-4, Claude và Gemini để giúp các doanh nghiệp mọi quy mô—từ các nhà khởi nghiệp độc lập đến các doanh nghiệp lớn như Shopify và Instacart—tự động hóa các tác vụ lặp đi lặp lại, xử lý dữ liệu và quy trình ra quyết định mà không cần viết code.

tools.name: Avoca
tools.shortDesc: 24/7 AI voice agents for home services that answer calls and book jobs automatically.
tools.fullDesc: Avoca is an AI-powered communications platform purpose-built for service businesses including HVAC, plumbing, and electrical companies. It handles inbound calls, appointment scheduling, outbound campaigns, and customer follow-ups through conversational AI agents that integrate directly with CRM systems like ServiceTitan. Designed for SMBs facing the challenge of missed calls and high CSR turnover.

The platform helps operators across HVAC, plumbing, automotive, moving, and other service industries capture every lead and convert more demand.</cite>

vi.fullDesc: Avoca là một nền tảng truyền thông được hỗ trợ bởi AI, được thiết kế đặc biệt cho các doanh nghiệp dịch vụ bao gồm HVAC, lắp ống nước và điện. info.label: Models
info.value: <cite index="6-1">Kimi K2.6 was released on April 20, 2026</cite>. This is <cite index="8-22,8-23">a 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model that activates 32 billion parameters per token during inference, supports a 262,144-token context window</cite>. <cite index="10-4">kimi-k2.6 is Kimi's latest and most intelligent model, possessing stronger and more stable long-term code writing capabilities and significantly enhances the Agent's autonomous execution capabilities</cite>.

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="1-2">262,142 token context window, maximum output of 262,142 tokens</cite>. <cite index="1-5,1-6">Kimi K2.6 is Moonshot AI's next-generation multimodal model, designed for long-horizon coding, coding-driven UI/UX generation, and multi-agent orchestration. It handles complex end-to-end coding tasks across Python, Rust, and Go, and can convert prompts and visual inputs into production-ready interfaces</cite>.

info.value: <cite index="4-1">Released on April 20, 2026</cite>

tools.name: NVIDIA Ising
tools.shortDesc: Open-source AI models for quantum processor calibration and error correction.
tools.fullDesc: NVIDIA Ising is the world's first family of open-source AI models designed to solve quantum computing's two biggest bottlenecks: processor calibration and error correction. It includes vision language models and 3D CNN architectures that reduce calibration time from days to hours and deliver 2.5x faster and 3x more accurate error correction than traditional approaches. Built for researchers and enterprises, it integrates seamlessly with NVIDIA's quantum software and hardware ecosystem.

info.value: Open-source AI Model Family

info.label: Released
info.value: April 2026

features: Ising Calibration: 35B parameter vision-language model for automating quantum processor tuning with agentic workflows
Ising Decoding: Dual 3D CNN variants optimized for speed or accuracy in real-time quantum error correction
Pre-trained models available with fine-tuning frameworks and deployment workflows
2.5x faster performance and 3x higher accuracy compared to pyMatching and traditional decoders
Integrated with CUDA-Q for hybrid quantum-classical computing and NVQLink for QPU-GPU interconnection
Local deployment capability protecting proprietary quantum data and supporting on-site customization
Comprehensive toolkit including training data, workflow cookbook, and NIM microservices
Outperforms Gemini 3.1 Pro, Claude Opus 4.6, and GPT 5.4 on QCalEval quantum calibration benchmark

vi.shortDesc: Các mô hình AI mã nguồn mở để hiệu chỉnh bộ xử lý lượng tử và sửa lỗi.
vi.fullDesc: NVIDIA Ising là dòng mô hình AI mã nguồn mở đầu tiên trên thế giới được thiết kế để giải quyết hai tập trung lớn nhất của điện toán lượng tử: hiệu chỉnh bộ xử lý và sửa lỗi. Nó bao gồm các mô hình ngôn ngữ hình ảnh và kiến trúc CNN 3D giúp giảm thời gian hiệu chỉnh từ nhiều ngày xuống vài giờ và cung cấp khả năng sửa lỗi nhanh hơn 2,5 lần và chính xác hơn 3 lần so với các phương pháp truyền thống. Được xây dựng cho các nhà nghiên cứu và doanh nghiệp, nó tích hợp liền mạch với hệ sinh thái phần mềm và phần cứng lượng tử của NVIDIA.

zh.shortDesc: 用于量子处理器校准和纠错的开源AI模型。
zh.fullDesc: NVIDIA Ising是全球首个开源AI模型系列，专门设计用于解决量子计算的两大瓶颈：处理器校准和纠错。它包含视觉语言模型和3D CNN架构，可将校准时间从数天缩短至数小时，并提供比传统方法快2.5倍、精度高3倍的纠错性能。该产品为研究人员和企业而构建，与NVIDIA的量子软硬件生态系统无缝集成。

tools.name: Ineffable Intelligence
tools.shortDesc: AI research lab building superintelligent systems through reinforcement learning without human data.
tools.fullDesc: Ineffable Intelligence is an ambitious AI research lab founded by David Silver, the AlphaGo architect and former head of DeepMind's reinforcement learning team. The company develops 'superlearner' AI systems that discover knowledge and solve complex problems through experience-based learning rather than relying on human-generated data. Their technology aims to create the next generation of intelligent agents capable of breakthroughs in science, medicine, engineering and beyond.

info.label: Type
info.value: AI Research Lab & Agent Technology

info.label: Released
info.value: Late 2025

info.label: Best for
info.value: Enterprise AI, Scientific discovery, Complex problem-solving

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Enterprise/Custom pricing (Research-stage company)

features: Reinforcement learning agents that learn from experience rather than human data
Pure self-discovery capability enabling autonomous knowledge generation
Agent-based architecture for learning directly from environmental interaction
Infrastructure built on trial-and-error learning mechanisms
Partnership with NVIDIA for scaled reinforcement learning infrastructure
Focus on novel problem-solving in engineering, biology and logistics
Continuous learning systems that improve over time through experience
Approach to artificial general intelligence without replicating human biases

demo.title: Experience-Based Learning
demo.desc: Ineffable's superlearner trains through interaction with its environment, testing ideas and improving solutions autonomously without requiring human-labeled datasets.

demo.title: Reinforcement Learning Loop
demo.desc: The system receives feedback from successes and failures, continuously refining its approach to discover new solutions and generate novel knowledge.

demo.title: Enterprise Applications
demo.desc: Deployed for specialized problem-solving in complex domains where human data is unavailable or insufficient, such as novel engineering challenges.

prompts.label: Problem Discovery
prompts.text: Design an autonomous agent to discover solutions for unsolved engineering problems through pure reinforcement learning experience.

prompts.label: Scientific Innovation
prompts.text: Develop a superlearner system that generates new hypotheses and insights in biology or chemistry without human training data.

prompts.label: Complex Optimization
prompts.text: Create an autonomous learning system for logistics optimization that discovers novel solutions through continuous environmental interaction.

pricing.note: Ineffable Intelligence is a research-stage company developing frontier AI technology. Pricing is not publicly disclosed and likely available only for enterprise partnerships and collaborations.

plans.name: Enterprise Partnership
features: Access to proprietary reinforcement learning superlearner
Dedicated infrastructure support with NVIDIA collaboration
Custom model development for specialized applications

tools.name: Accio Work
tools.priceLabel: Free with paid plans for advanced features
tools.shortDesc: Plug-and-play enterprise AI agent platform for SMEs to automate sourcing, compliance, and global commerce operations.
tools.fullDesc: Accio Work is a no-code enterprise AI agent platform by Alibaba International, launched in March 2026, that deploys specialized teams of autonomous agents to handle end-to-end business operations. It enables SMEs and solo founders to automate compliance across 100+ markets, conduct supplier negotiations, manage marketing campaigns, and coordinate logistics without requiring technical setup or coding expertise.

info.label: Type
info.value: Enterprise AI Agent Platform

info.label: Released
info.value: March 2026

info.label: Best for
info.value: SMEs, solo entrepreneurs, cross-border e-commerce

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Freemium with tiered paid plans

features: Multi-agent orchestration assembles specialized teams that work in parallel on complex business tasks
Automated compliance handling for VAT filing, tax refunds, and customs documentation across 100+ markets
Autonomous supplier negotiation and RFQ generation with real-time supplier matching
Local-first architecture keeps sensitive data on your device while routing LLM requests through secure gateways
Support for multiple LLMs including Gemini, GPT-4o, Claude, and Qwen with per-agent model selection
Skills marketplace to create, install, and share reusable agent capabilities for specific workflows
Messaging platform integration with Telegram, Discord, WeChat, DingTalk, and Lark for direct communication
Scheduled automations for recurring tasks with cron-like natural language or UI-based scheduling

demo.title: Setting Up Your First Agent
demo.desc: Create a custom agent by defining its role, capabilities, and which LLM model to use. Assign it specific skills from the marketplace or build custom ones for specialized tasks.
demo.code: Create compliance agent to handle VAT filings across UK, EU, and US markets

demo.title: Sourcing Automation
demo.desc: Deploy a sourcing agent that generates RFQs, identifies qualified suppliers from Alibaba's network, and conducts multi-round price negotiations automatically.
demo.code: Find suppliers for ergonomic office chairs with MOQ under 100 units

demo.title: Building an Online Store
demo.desc: Use agent teams to research products, analyze market trends, source suppliers, and design a complete online storefront from research to go-live.
demo.code: Create and launch dropshipping store for sustainable home products

demo.title: Scheduled Operations Monitoring
demo.desc: Set up automated tasks that run on a schedule, such as daily competitor analysis, inventory checks, or performance reports delivered to Slack or Telegram.
demo.code: Schedule daily market trend report delivery to team Slack channel

prompts.label: Sourcing
prompts.text: Find suppliers for minimalist leather wallets with custom engraving capability. Check pricing for 500+ unit orders and compile supplier comparison with lead times.

prompts.label: Compliance
prompts.text: Generate VAT filing documents for my EU sales last quarter across France, Germany, and Spain. Calculate tax refund eligibility and prepare customs declarations.

prompts.label: Market Research
prompts.text: Analyze trending product categories in fitness accessories for next 6 months. Identify top-performing products, competitor pricing, and untapped niches.

prompts.label: Automation
prompts.text: Set up a daily report that checks our product inventory levels across all listings and alerts me via Telegram if any SKU drops below 50 units.

pricing.note: Accio Work operates on a freemium model with a generous free tier for individual users and teams. Paid plans unlock advanced features, higher automation limits, and premium model access. Early adopters received special promotional access including 2-week unlimited model usage.

The platform serves Fortune 50 companies including WeightWatchers, SiriusXM, and Sonos.

tools.name: Runware
tools.shortDesc: Unified AI API for image, video, audio, and text generation at up to 90% lower cost.
tools.fullDesc: Runware is a developer-focused platform offering a single unified API for accessing 400K+ generative AI models. It powers image generation, video synthesis, audio creation, 3D generation, and LLM tasks through its proprietary Sonic Inference Engine, delivering sub-second inference speeds with transparent pay-per-use pricing. Built for startups, enterprises, and creative professionals who need fast, affordable AI media generation without complex infrastructure.

info.label: Type
info.value: AI Inference API / Multimodal Generation Platform

info.label: Best for
info.value: Developers building AI-powered products, content creators, enterprises needing high-throughput media generation

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Pay-per-use, starting at $0.0006/image; custom enterprise plans available

features: Access to 400K+ preloaded AI models including FLUX, Stable Diffusion, Kling, and custom LoRAs
Sub-second image generation and rapid video processing via Sonic Inference Engine custom hardware
Text-to-image, image-to-image, inpainting, outpainting, and ControlNet parameter control
Video generation from text or images at 62% lower cost than competitors
Audio synthesis, 3D asset generation, and LLM inference through single unified API endpoint
Commercial usage rights included for official models; upload and run custom fine-tuned models
Interactive Playground for testing models before integration with real-time cost preview
REST API and WebSocket support with consistent request/response patterns across all modalities

demo.title: Generate an image with text prompt

curl -X POST https://api.runware.ai/v1 \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' \
  -d '[{"taskType": "imageInference", "taskUUID": "unique-id", "positivePrompt": "A golden retriever in a park", "model": "runware:400@1", "width": 1024, "height": 1024}]'

demo.code: {"taskType": "videoInference", "taskUUID": "unique-id", "positivePrompt": "A person walking through a forest", "model": "kling-video", "duration": 5}

tools.fullDesc: Oboe is an AI-native learning platform that instantly creates tailored educational courses from simple prompts, offering multiple content formats including articles, podcasts, lectures, games, and quizzes. Built by the Anchor co-founders, it uses multi-agent architecture to generate high-quality, personalized learning experiences that adapt to individual preferences and learning styles. Ideal for lifelong learners, students, and professionals seeking on-demand education across any subject.

tools.name: Parallel Web Systems
tools.shortDesc: Web search and research APIs built for AI agents with structured outputs and citations.
tools.fullDesc: Parallel Web Systems provides purpose-built web search and research APIs designed specifically for AI agents and autonomous systems. The platform enables agents to perform real-time web searches, extract structured data, and conduct deep research tasks with verifiable citations and minimal hallucinations. Built for enterprises and AI developers who need accurate, reliable web data at predictable costs.

info.label: Type
info.value: API Infrastructure

info.label: Best for
info.value: AI agents, research workflows, data enrichment, enterprise automation

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Pay-as-you-go per API call ($0.005-$10 per 1000 requests)

features: Real-time web search API returning ranked URLs with token-optimized excerpts for AI consumption
Research API for deep dives into topics with fact extraction and citations to reduce hallucinations
Data extraction API converting unstructured web content into structured JSON/CSV formats
Chat API integration for interactive chat applications with web context
Monitor API for continuous tracking of web changes and new events
MCP (Model Context Protocol) server integration with Claude Code and other AI tools
SOC2 Type II certified for enterprise security and compliance
Pre-built integrations with LangChain, AutoGPT, CrewAI, and other agent frameworks

demo.title: Basic Search Query
demo.desc: Query the web search API to find current information about a topic with ranked results and compressed excerpts optimized for AI processing.
demo.code: curl -X POST https://api.parallel.ai/search -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' -d '{"query": "latest AI agent frameworks 2026"}'

demo.title: Extract Page Content
demo.desc: Extract full page content from specific URLs and convert to structured data format for downstream processing.
demo.code: curl -X POST https://api.parallel.ai/extract -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' -d '{"url": "https://example.com", "objective": "extract product details"}'

demo.title: Research with Citations
demo.desc: Conduct deep research on a topic with the Task API, returning comprehensive findings with cited sources.
demo.code: curl -X POST https://api.parallel.ai/task -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' -d '{"query": "competitive analysis of web search APIs", "processor": "base"}'

prompts.label: Financial Analysis

prompts.label: Content Generation

prompts.label: Sales Intelligence

pricing.note: Parallel uses pay-as-you-go pricing per API request with transparent, predictable costs. Offers 16,000 free search requests for getting started. No token-based pricing—you always know exact costs before running queries.
